mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_session_summary_segment ( session_id, seq_start_no, seq_end_no, turn_count, source_token_estimate, segment_summary, structured_summary, anchored_entities, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{seqStartNo}, #{seqEndNo}, #{turnCount}, #{sourceTokenEstimate}, #{segmentSummary}, CAST(#{structuredSummaryJson} AS jsonb), CAST(#{anchoredEntitiesJson} AS jsonb), #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT uk_chat_session_summary_segment_range DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT id::text, session_id, seq_start_no, seq_end_no, turn_count, source_token_estimate, segment_summary, structured_summary::text AS structured_summary, anchored_entities::text AS anchored_entities, status, created_at, updated_at FROM chat_session_summary_segment WHERE id = #{id}::uuid

SELECT id::text, session_id, seq_start_no, seq_end_no, turn_count, source_token_estimate, segment_summary, structured_summary::text AS structured_summary, anchored_entities::text AS anchored_entities, status, created_at, updated_at FROM chat_session_summary_segment WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND status = 'active' ORDER BY seq_end_no DESC

SELECT id::text, session_id, seq_start_no, seq_end_no, turn_count, source_token_estimate, segment_summary, structured_summary::text AS structured_summary, anchored_entities::text AS anchored_entities, status, created_at, updated_at FROM chat_session_summary_segment WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND status = 'active' ORDER BY seq_start_no ASC
